notes: AD90 — 90% aluminum oxide armor ceramic by CoorsTek. Lower purity than AD95/AD995, lower cost. RHAe ~1.8-2.2 per mm vs 7.62 AP. Adequate for medium-threat applications. More affordable than AD95 with acceptable ballistic performance. Used in vehicle applique kits and lower-tier body armor.

source.methodology: RHAe from CoorsTek published ballistic test data for AD90 vs 7.62mm AP. Density and hardness per manufacturer specification.
